ops.text: EFFORT CLOSED. PLF-07 await-release helper shipped (f2e69f02, tools/await-release.py) — live-verified against captain-hook v12.10.0 (gh-release + PyPI + brew phases all confirmed; timeout + usage paths proven; per-phase timeouts; deliberately never uvx — the PyPI JSON 200 is the propagation signal). Every confirmed-automatable theme is now shipped+proven or an explicit backlog task; needs-judgment themes carry recorded decisions; refuted themes carry corrected memories. Final ledger lives in the two prior entries + attachments (catalog.json, verdicts.jsonl, lane-findings.tgz). Fleet state at close: autobump live in 13 repos (7+cc-skills bump-armed, 4 guard-armed, cc-runtime guard dispatch-only), plugin-doctor/cache-prune/await-release in cc-skills tools/, capt-hook 12.10.0 + cc-context 0.29.1 released and picked up locally, coherence asserts live at homebrew-tap v1.
